{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Twenty-One
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The current location is [[Sector Twenty-One]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Sector Twenty-One]] is a neighboring [[Sector]] to [[Suriel]]'s current position.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
